title: Diagnose SQLITE_BUSY errors
description: Trace busy/locked errors to the writer contention or long transaction causing them and fix the root cause.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm whether the error is SQLITE_BUSY (lock contention) or SQLITE_LOCKED (table-level, often same-connection). 2. Check busy_timeout is set and non-zero on the failing connection. 3. Find long-held write transactions (a BEGIN that does slow work or waits on I/O before COMMIT). 4. Look for the read-to-write upgrade deadlock where two connections hold read locks and both try to upgrade — switch to BEGIN IMMEDIATE. 5. Shorten and batch write transactions. Rollback point: revert transaction-mode changes. Validation: under a concurrency test, contended writes wait briefly and succeed instead of returning SQLITE_BUSY.
